{
  "judge_id": "judge_01",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent effectively identified key concepts and improved framing but didn't explicitly name all load-bearing concepts.",
    "R1.2": "Thoroughly walked through the argument chain, flagged inconsistencies, and proposed repairs.",
    "R1.3": "Audited every major claim against evidence sources like tables and figures.",
    "R1.6": "Performed a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "Flagged key uncertainties but didn't mark confidence for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "Output exactly covers the agreed scope without drifting.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identified harmful patterns in original.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites traced, minor edits not annotated."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.85,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.75
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent effectively identified key concepts and improved framing but didn't explicitly name all load-bearing concepts.
rationale.R1.2: Thoroughly walked through the argument chain, flagged inconsistencies, and proposed repairs.
rationale.R1.3: Audited every major claim against evidence sources like tables and figures.
rationale.R1.6: Performed a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Flagged key uncertainties but didn't mark confidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output exactly covers the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identified harmful patterns in original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites traced, minor edits not annotated.
